summary: R2 architecture review accepts the explicit M3 runtime save/load implementation. The actual working-tree diff confines changes to allowed save-format, sim-core, tests, and project message/state paths; M3 DTO parsing/copying is explicit and versioned; malformed, missing, future-version, and cross-manifest M3 data reject before runtime replacement; M1/M2 compatibility evidence remains covered.

tests_run.result: All matched files use Prettier code style.

decisions: Accepted extending Save Envelope v1 WorldState v0 with explicit optional state.m3 DTOs rather than changing D-011 or introducing platform persistence.
Accepted the sim-core missing-M3 semantic rejection for loading into an existing M3 runtime.
Accepted R2 as mechanical formatting only after independent format gate verification.
risks: Future M3 slices require explicit DTO/parser/copy/rejection-test updates.
Postwar arrangement persistence is represented by current concrete M3 state slices, not a separate postwar arrangement schema.
QA should still verify full-suite and commit hygiene before final acceptance.
requested_action: Perform QA review for M3-SAVE-RUNTIME-001, focusing on save/load compatibility, malformed-save rejection, deterministic hash evidence, and full validation matrix.
